original_query: Provide more details for the schema 'weRetail: Customer Actions'

risk_notes: Audience APIs can be paginated; avoid assuming first page is exhaustive.
candidate_apis.use_when: List or look up Real-Time CDP audiences and audience metadata/counts.

risk_notes: Definition IDs and audience IDs are related but not always identical.

steps.rationale: Use SQL first for entity grounding, then API only for live/platform state or status verification.

steps.purpose: Ground names/IDs in local snapshot before API verification.
steps.sql: SELECT S."BLUEPRINTID" AS blueprint_id, S."NAME", S."CLASS", S."ISPROFILEENABLED", S."UPDATEDTIME" AS updated_time, S."REQUIREDFIELDS" AS required_fields, COUNT(DISTINCT SD."COLLECTIONID") AS collection_count, COUNT(DISTINCT SA."PROPERTY") AS property_count FROM "dim_blueprint" AS S LEFT JOIN "hkg_br_blueprint_collection" AS SD ON S."BLUEPRINTID" = SD."BLUEPRINTID" LEFT JOIN "hkg_br_blueprint_property" AS SA ON S."BLUEPRINTID" = SA."BLUEPRINTID" WHERE LOWER(S."NAME") = LOWER('weRetail: Customer Actions') GROUP BY S."BLUEPRINTID", S."NAME", S."CLASS", S."ISPROFILEENABLED", S."UPDATEDTIME", S."REQUIREDFIELDS" LIMIT 3
